headline: Bet on These 5 Low-Leverage Stocks as SK Hynix Makes Record Nasdaq-Debut
summary: SK Hynix's record ADR debut boosts tech optimism, but rising geopolitical risks put the spotlight on five low-leverage stocks built for resilience.
